design_name: Parametric FPV 250 drone unibody bottom mainplate in X-configuration with 4mm uniform thickness, featuring motor mounting pads, flight controller mounting holes, and a secondary accessory mounting pattern.
prompt:
Generate a parametric FPV 250 drone unibody bottom mainplate in millimeters. The design is an X-configuration, symmetrically balanced. The total diagonal distance from front-left motor center to rear-right motor center is 250mm. The main center fuselage body is a rectangle 40mm wide x 120mm long x 4mm uniform thickness. Four symmetrical carbon fiber arms extend from the central fuselage out to the motor positions; each arm is 12mm wide and 4mm thick. At the tip of each arm, generate a circular motor mounting pad 28mm in diameter with a central hole 5mm in diameter, surrounded by four 3mm screw holes on a 16mm Bolt Circle Diameter (BCD) pattern. In the center of the main fuselage body, pattern four 3mm through-holes in a square 30.5mm x 30.5mm configuration centered on the origin for flight controller stack mounting. Add a secondary 20mm x 20mm M2 hole pattern directly behind the central stack.

Confirmed measurements:
  diagonal_distance_mm: 250
  fuselage_width_mm: 40
  fuselage_length_mm: 120
  fuselage_thickness_mm: 4
  arm_width_mm: 12
  arm_thickness_mm: 4
  motor_pad_diameter_mm: 28
  motor_pad_center_hole_mm: 5
  motor_pad_screw_hole_size_mm: 3
  motor_pad_bcd_mm: 16
  flight_controller_hole_pattern_mm: 30.5
  flight_controller_hole_size_mm: 3
  secondary_hole_pattern_mm: 20
  secondary_hole_size_mm: 2
primitive_plan_summary: Parametric FPV 250 drone unibody bottom mainplate in X-configuration with 4mm uniform thickness, featuring motor mounting pads, flight controller mounting holes, and a secondary accessory mounting pattern.
